positive: Minimalist illustration of a joyful forest woodland scene. Features a bold, central silhouette of various playful woodland creatures—a leaping deer, a fox curled up with autumn leaves, and whimsical bunnies hopping among stylized oak trees and glowing mushrooms. The style is inspired by mid-century modern children's book illustrations, utilizing thick outlines and flat, highly saturated color blocking. Limited color palette: deep forest greens, burnt oranges, mustard yellows, and cream. Perfect for apparel screen printing, with crisp edges and high contrast. Composition is centered and balanced, suitable for a repeating pattern or a single chest print. Bright, even lighting.
